notes: Production source. Keep existing Google pipeline stable while new sources are developed in data-debug first.
Meta has separate raw, normalized, history/diff outputs and is viewable through the dashboard source switcher.
Apple normalized/history outputs are viewable through the dashboard source switcher. Collection config remains source-specific.
Microsoft normalized output is viewable through the dashboard source switcher. History/diff outputs can be added later without changing source selection.
NVIDIA uses the PCSX JSON API with separate raw, normalized, history/diff outputs and dashboard source selection.
Amazon uses /en/search.json. Software Development is the primary query; Software Engineer is collected as a secondary query and deduped by job id.
